allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Security audit fixes: remove key exposure, add timeouts, strict TS

- Remove API key exposure from vite.config.ts \(CRITICAL\)
- Add 30-60s request timeouts to all API calls
- Add input validation and sanitization
- Enable strict TypeScript mode
- Fix all type errors \(remove any types\)
- Install @types/react and @types/react-dom
- Change server host from 0.0.0.0 to localhost

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add retry with exponential backoff for API reliability

- geminiService: 3 retries with 2s/4s/8s backoff
- librarianService: 3 retries with 1.5s/3s/6s backoff
- Handles 503, rate limits, overloaded, busy errors
- User-friendly error messages for common API issues

This should help with Vercel deployment where API
may be busier due to cold starts and shared limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Switch text analysis to gemini-2.5-flash \(less overloaded\)

- leonardoService: use gemini-2.5-flash for soul/face analysis
- librarianService: use gemini-2.5-flash for text analysis
- Keep gemini-2.5-flash-image only for actual image generation

The flash-image model is newer and more overloaded.
Standard flash model should be more reliable for text tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Inworld TTS for production - use direct API URL

- Proxy only works in local dev \(Vite server\)
- In production \(Vercel\), call api.inworld.ai directly
- Auto-detect environment based on hostname

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Switch text models to gemini-3-flash-preview

- leonardoService: gemini-3-flash-preview for face/soul analysis
- librarianService: gemini-3-flash-preview for text analysis  
- geminiService: keep gemini-2.5-flash-image for image generation

Testing newer model for better availability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
